dataPrinciples: Data ownership must be explicit at the domain level.
Master data should be shared through governed interfaces rather than copied ad hoc.
Analytical use of data must be traceable to operational sources.
Sensitive information must be classified and protected according to policy.

dataDomains.name: Employee and Access
dataDomains.description: Logical data domain governing employee and access information within the enterprise architecture scope.
